message:
feat(tests): add T7.10 exhaustive adapter boundary correctness tests (71 tests)

Validates all correctness contracts from T7.8 performance budgets:
- CC-01..05: CancelAware mode behavior (BestEffort/Strict/TimeoutFallback)
- BC-01..04: Blocking bridge Cx propagation, panic capture, RAII guard
- BB-01..07: Body bridge frame sequences, size hints, limits, trailers
- TC-01..03: Tower bridge readiness, call forwarding, error preservation
- IC-01..04: I/O bridge trait impls, cancel-safety documentation
- HC-01..04: Hyper bridge Executor/Timer/Sleep trait implementations
- IG-01..07: Cross-cutting invariant enforcement gates
- AdapterConfig budget enforcement and error type completeness
- Startup/shutdown/drain contract verification (SU/SD/GD)

Closes asupersync-2oh2u.7.10

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
